news.t: India ETFs Climb as Investors Look Beyond Coronavirus
India ETFs Test Uptrend Line as Budget Looms
Indian ETFs Surge After Abolition of Tax Surcharge

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSCI India Bull 2X ETF (INDL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI India index. The fund provides daily 2x exposure to an index designed to track the performance of the Indian equity market. INDL was launched on Mar 11, 2010 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: India ETFs Climb as Investors Look Beyond Coronavirus
data.text: Indian stocks continue to march higher despite growing coronavirus cases. Trade the country's stocks using these three ETFs.

data.text: Indian stocks are trading at support ahead of this weekend's closely watched Union Budget. Add these India ETFs to your watchlist.

data.text: Discover why Indian markets bucked Friday’s global selloff. Gain exposure to the subcontinent’s stocks using these three India ETFs.
